lines.text: This one for the algorithm This one
For the fallen Wi Fi
I looked around like where'd my wife
Go AI said Terms updated Damn Satan
Got my wife through the AI I'm
Single ladies heart got hacked Now the
Whole thing crazy Love went dark but
The drip's still wavy If she gon
Digital then God gon save me Satan
Got my wife through the chatbot light
Now I'm outside in the brick city
Night Ring came off but my soul
Still bright Single ladies I'm alive I'm
Alright Why cry my God when the
Bass still not Lost my love to
A cursed TikTok Deep fake smile with
A blue lid lock Now she in
The cloud like a ghost in a
Box I said baby come home she
Said update pending Love turned cold with
The terms page ending Devil in the
Cold with the dark mode blending But
I found grace with a heartbreak bending
I ain't mad I'm delivered soul got
Cracked in shimmer Tears went down ding
Glitter Now I walk clean through winter
If the devil got the data let
Him keep that file I got God
In my chest and a brand new
Smile I got hope in my step
I got pain with style I was
Down for a minute now I'm back
By a mile Satan got my wife
Through the AI I'm single ladies heart
Got hacked Now the whole thing crazy
Love went dark but the drip still
Wavy If she gone digital then God
Gon save me Satan got my wife
Through the chatbot light Now I'm outside
In the brick city night Dream came
Off but my soul still bright Single
Ladies I'm alive I'm alright Noon over
Penn Station tracks I got pain in
My coat got faith in my bag
Broad street wind try to push me
Back But the old me gone no
Lookin back She chose the screen I
Chose the sky She chose the lie
I chose most high She went ghost
In the machine no lie I went
Human I went healed I went fly
No revenge no bitter taste I just
Let that demon waste I got mercy
On my face I got rhythm I
Got grace I'm single ladies don't be
Scared I got love that came prepared
Been through hell still got care Still
Got jokes still got prayer AI stole
The wedding song Devil tried to sing
Along But my heart too loud too
Strong God said son move on Delete
The curse clear the cash Take my
Pain turn it cash Take my shame
Make it last New life load and
Watch it flash Satan got my wife
Through the AI I'm single ladies heart
Got hacked Now the whole thing crazy
Love went dark but the drip still
Wavy If she gone digital then God
Gon save me Satan got my wife
Through the chatbot light Now I'm outside
In the brick city night Ring came
Off but my soul still bright Single
Ladies I'm alive I'm alright She in
The cloud I'm in the light Devil
Got the app God got my life
Single ladies brick city Amen swipe right
